query: /infrastructure-coder docker Review and optimize this Dockerfile for a Python FastAPI app - it's producing 2GB images
expected_behavior: Agent runs dockerfile-analyzer.py on the existing Dockerfile
Agent parses JSON output for issues and optimization opportunities
Agent suggests multi-stage build separating build dependencies from runtime
Agent recommends layer ordering by change frequency (dependencies before source code)
Agent suggests distroless or Alpine for runtime base image
Agent recommends .dockerignore to exclude unnecessary files from build context
Agent includes non-root USER directive for security
Agent references references/dockerfile-guide.md for detailed patterns
